scripts.install:packages: npm install --prefix shared --ignore-scripts && npm run build --prefix shared && npm install --prefix server --ignore-scripts && npm install --prefix client --ignore-scripts
scripts.dev: npm run build --prefix shared && concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.db:up: node scripts/resolve-ports.mjs && docker compose up -d db
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix shared && npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --prefix shared && npm run typecheck --prefix server && npm run typecheck --prefix client
